hero.subtitle: Get clear, practical legal guidance for any question. No jargon—just straightforward answers and next steps, tailored for everyday situations.

insights.title: Empower your legal knowledge
insights.description: Discover your rights and get expert advice on any legal issue. Our platform simplifies complex legal information, making it accessible to everyone.

services.title: Legal help, simplified for everyone
services.subtitle: Get clear, practical legal guidance in minutes. Ask questions, understand your rights, and find your next steps—no legal background needed.
services.quickChatDesc: Ask any legal question and receive clear, straightforward answers—no case details required. Perfect for everyday doubts.
services.caseAdvisorDesc: Share your situation for precise, step-by-step legal advice. We'll build a strategy, evidence checklist, and timeline for you.

features.title: Legal answers made effortless
features.easyDesc: Access legal help through a straightforward, intuitive interface designed for everyone—no law degree required. Just type and get answers.
features.accurateDesc: Get reliable, up-to-date legal information powered by advanced AI that cites specific Indian Constitutional Articles and Acts.
features.saveDesc: Find quick, relevant answers without wasting resources. We optimize every interaction for speed, efficiency, and clarity.

faqCta.ctaDesc: Find clear, practical guidance on your rights and next steps in simple language.
faqCta.faq1A: Think of AI tokens as "word-coins". A typical chat burns thousands. We do the heavy lifting upfront, optimizing your prompt to get a complete strategy in one go. "Credits Saved" tracks that efficiency.
faqCta.faq2Q: Can I use this in court?
faqCta.faq2A: No. Advocat-Easy is an <bold>educational tool</bold>. We empower you to understand your rights and strategy so you can talk to a lawyer confidently, but this is not a substitute for professional counsel.
faqCta.faq3A: Absolutely. Your details and questions are encrypted and never shared publicly. We use them solely to generate your specific legal analysis during the active session.
faqCta.faq4A: Use <bold>Quick Chat</bold> for everyday doubts (e.g., "Is this rent clause legal?"). Use <bold>Case Advisor</bold> when you have a specific dispute and need a structured roadmap and evidence checklist.

Dashboard.title: Legal Command Center
Dashboard.subtitle: Select a tool below. We combine <bold>AI precision</bold> with <bold>Indian Constitution</bold> to guide you.

quickChat.title: Quick Rights Chat
quickChat.desc: Ask everyday questions like "Can my landlord keep my deposit?" and get instant, cited answers based on the Constitution.

caseAdvisor.title: Case Strategist
caseAdvisor.desc: Dealing with a serious dispute? Structure your evidence, map your witnesses, and build a winning legal roadmap.

header.creditsDesc: We calculate "Effort Saved" based on the complexity of your query.
header.vagueDesc: High Credits (1.5x - 3.0x). AI bridges the gaps.
header.specificDesc: Lower Credits. You provided the context.

emptyState.title: How can I help you today?
emptyState.desc: Ask about your rights, specific acts, or describe a situation. Use <bold>Quick</bold> for summaries and <bold>Deep</bold> for detailed legal strategy.

input.placeholderDeep: Describe the full situation in detail for a better legal strategy...
input.disclaimer: Advocat can make mistakes. Please verify legal citations independently.

citations.title: Citations
citations.empty: Citations and relevant acts will appear here when you use <bold>Deep Mode</bold>.

step3.title: Evidence & Witnesses
step3.secDesc: Mandatory for admissibility of WhatsApp, Emails, CCTV, etc.
step3.secNote: Note: There is no central "Code" for this. It is a signed affidavit.
step3.secNo: No, I need to draft it
step3.secNoted: Noted. Advocat will include a <bold>65B Draft Template</bold> in your final strategy.

step4.title: Legal Strategy Report
step4.noCitations: No specific acts cited in this brief.

toasts.witErr: Please fill in all Witness details.

Auth.quote: "The law should not be a mystery. We empower you to understand your rights before you even step into a lawyer's office."
Auth.loginDesc: Enter your details to access your case files.
Auth.signupDesc: Start understanding your rights in minutes.
